summary: Added LIMIT price_offset (cents) end-to-end: Action model and evaluator parsing, actions.py applies offset after resolving price_var/price literal then clamps 1-99. ActionBuilder VarOrNumeric supports optional offsetKey; LIMIT price in var mode shows +c input for signed cents (e.g. -5 under LastTraded). Switching price to value clears price_offset. Assistant prompt documents price_var + price_offset.
current_status: Feature ready to try in editor: LIMIT, var price, set +c to -5 for last minus five cents.
